---
title: "nitrix.semiring.algebras"
generated: true
signature-hash: 2f0984cddffcb05e
description: "Built-in algebras shipped with `nitrix.semiring`."
listing:
  id: nitrix-semiring-algebras-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-semiring-algebras/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.semiring.algebras`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Built-in algebras shipped with `nitrix.semiring`.

Each algebra is exported as a module-level [`Semiring`](nitrix-semiring/Semiring.qmd) (relaxed) or
[`StrictSemiring`](nitrix-semiring/StrictSemiring.qmd) instance:

================== ===================== ============== ========================
Algebra            Type                  Identity       Backward
================== ===================== ============== ========================
REAL               StrictSemiring        `0`          transpose-matmul
LOG                StrictSemiring        `-inf`       softmax-weighted
TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS  StrictSemiring        `-inf`       argmax-gather (subgrad)
TROPICAL_MIN_PLUS  StrictSemiring        `+inf`       argmin-gather (subgrad)
BOOLEAN            StrictSemiring        `False`      n/a (raises)
EUCLIDEAN          Semiring (relaxed)    `0`          normalised-diff w/ guard
================== ===================== ============== ========================

The pre-built instances are intended for module-level use:
    from nitrix.semiring import REAL, LOG, TROPICAL_MAX_PLUS
    semiring_matmul(A, B, semiring=LOG)

A user can compose their own [`Semiring`](nitrix-semiring/Semiring.qmd) by combining a
[`Monoid`](nitrix-semiring/Monoid.qmd) with a [`Semigroup`](nitrix-semiring/Semigroup.qmd); the kernel substrate does not
care whether the algebra is built-in or user-defined as long as the
protocol shape is honoured.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-semiring-algebras-symbols}
:::
